## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between Jimmy and Marcel on SEO/content marketing services and building a staffing agency for AI/SEO talent.](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel is looking to build a staffing agency that provides trained AI/SEO talent to clients, with a focus on scaling through efficient processes and systems](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Jimmy has established SEO/content marketing systems and processes that could complement Marcel's vision](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [They discussed potential collaboration models where Jimmy could help manage client engagements, train staff, and develop processes/systems](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Long-term goal is to build a highly profitable agency by leveraging their combined expertise and efficient scaling](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)

## Topics

### Potential Collaboration Model

  - [Marcel envisions bringing Jimmy in to help manage client engagements, train staff in Sri Lanka, and develop efficient processes/systems](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Initial engagements could have Jimmy take a lower rate to get the systems/processes established](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [After 3 months, transition to a revenue share model where Jimmy is incentivized to retain clients long-term](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Leverage each other's expertise - Jimmy's SEO/content skills and Marcel's staffing/process experience](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)

### Jimmy's Current Systems

  - [Has established SEO/content marketing systems using VAs in the Philippines](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Handles full-service engagements from keyword research to content production/publishing](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [Efficient process with 80% margins currently](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Could likely handle 5-6 more clients with his current team](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)

### Marcel's Vision

  - [Build a staffing agency providing trained AI/SEO talent to clients](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
  - [Start with higher-value engagements using staff in Sri Lanka](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Add VAs from Philippines later for more cost efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Focus on developing robust processes, templates, and a strong knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Potentially expand to broader "AI-led growth" services beyond just SEO/content](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=2315.0)

### Revenue Model Discussion

  - [Marcel's initial engagements targeting $6k-9k/month retainers](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Discussed potential margins, referral deals, and incentive structures](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=1958.0)
  - [Long-term goal of building a highly profitable, scalable agency](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=2580.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to put together a more concrete collaboration proposal](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=2714.0)
  - [Discuss webinar opportunities to drive leads/awareness](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=2719.0)
  - [Explore ways to leverage each other's expertise and client successes](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=1891.0)
  - [Align on revenue model that incentivizes growth while being mutually beneficial](https://fathom.video/share/xaRRbZEzFGNJKyinkRUsHxPXfMATVL2S?tab=summary&timestamp=2150.0)
